title: nodejs:20 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
nodejs
[1:20.20.0-1]
- Update to version 20.20.0
  Resolves: RHEL-130972

nodejs-nodemon
[3.0.1-1]
- Rebase to 3.0.1
- Resolves: CVE-2022-25883
